en Language JugglucoNG
OK Cancel
"Init Garmin connect SDK failed: "
Scanning impossible, no NFC on this device NFC is disabled, you can enable it in device settings.
Kerfstok is not installed on watch Kerfstok is not installed on watch. In Garmin Connect IQ store you can get it
Too low or too high glucose Juggluco has lost contact with sensor Reminder to dose, eat or exercise Notifies current glucose value Ongoing program Permission Scan Scans History Stream Reset Help Search to past No bluetooth Bluetooth Enabled Bluetooth Disabled Amounts @string/amountsname Meals Close Saves up to the last value displayed on the screen. The beginning is the number of specified days back in time. Detect Test IP Test Label Passive only Active only Both Receive from "Data present on receiver until: " Visible Password Delete Specify \'Receive from\' or data to send to other device You should specify an IP Network ports should be between 1024 and 65535 Start Now Mirror sends amounts This host: Doze mode? Sync Alarms Save Add Connection Off Touch Glucose notification Low glucose alarm "Label: " "Round to: " "Weight: " Ringtone High glucose alarm Value available notification Loss of signal alarm after "Can't set minutes to " minutes is too long "Target range: " "Graph range: " "Units" Glucose-axis LEFT Scanning starts app Patched Libre Disable camera key Invert screen NFC sound Manually scale Time Glucose Sensor via bluetooth For Alarms in non-Mirror devices \'Sensor via bluetooth\' should be turned on Set unit first Number Labels Colors Reminders Display Shortcuts Advanced New Delete last Meal: Ring Days \' invalid. Days should be a natural number. Summary graph Forget Reenable Info Last failure Last success Stage Use Bluetooth Connection Handshake Glucose value Info Set device specific setting Update in doze mode Refresh Send queue Reinit Watch app installed on watch Error Add Item "Round " Repeat Ingredient: Select Carbohydrate: Carbohydrate Total: Meal total: Quantity " per " You need to specify ingredient You need to specify how much Define Edit Name: Carbohydrates/unit: Database Search Trace Unknown Show zero Composition of 100 gram Status Config Init watch app No watches found Get watch app Kerfstok Meal Delete? Sound Play Default Flash Permission Shortcut Value Next page IPs: Port "saved" Save failed Not saved Failed by exception No data Add sensor end date to calendar app "End date sensor " Open Without sensor Library not functioning properly, try a different one Installed library Can\'t extract %s, try a different apk Connecting Runs to exchange data "No new value since " " Low Glucose!" " High Glucose!" @string/lowglucose @string/highglucose Send to Resend data Minimum Minutes deactivated: Duration (sec): Duration: sec " not entered" " and " Disturb Send to Libreview Libreview Send now "Sensor via Bluetooth" should be turned on or this should be configured as a mirror Vibrate Turbo Dark mode Multiply with: Rapid acting insulin Long acting insulin Comments Don\'t send Send amounts Resend data? Be careful not to send overlapping data to Libreview. Get Account ID from Libreview? The Account ID is needed to use Libre3 sensors that are activated with Abbotts Libre3 app with this Libreview account. Delete connection? Wakelock Wifi Heart rate xDrip broadcast Sensors permission needed to display heart rate. Set it in Device Settings, Apps, Permissions, Juggluco Floating glucose @string/floatglucose
Font size @string/fontsize Font size too large: max= Foreground Background Back-
Transparent Touchable
Needs permission adb shell pm grant tk.glucodata android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW https://www.juggluco.nl/Jugglucohelp/floatingconfig.html Delete reminder? Delete label?
Disconnect Stop using this sensor for streaming?
E-Mail: Get Account ID
E-Mail address too short E-Mail address too long Password should be at least 8 characters long Maximal password length is 36 characters From Libreview Manually "No account id specified " "Wrong format " "No app listening to " api_secret Leave without saving? Active Use SSL Full Chain
Private Key Local only : api_secret too long. max= " invalid port number" "new api_secret: " "new port =" Web server Give Amounts Android Something went wrong " dose " " doses " Reading insulin pen failed. Try again. "Change insulin type to " "Type: " Only add doses from after: Modify Not synced Setting to defaults can result in loss of data. Defaults Notify Separate Immediate Alarm is alarm Speed Pitch Voice Seconds between Test Bluetooth History Spy views No value Talk Watch Menus System UI Sensors Settings About Export Mirror New Amount List Statistics Float Last Scan Date Day back Day later Week back Week later Talk touch Speak messages Speak alarms Speak glucose Not found No Ringtone Picker found "Can't play " " seconds" "Duration can't be negative: " " too large, maximum=65535, " " too large" Can\'t use specification Turn on NEARBY DEVICES permission Enable Bluetooth Turn on Location permission Bluetooth is turned off When everything is sent to a host, \"Receive from\" should be turned off. The port number should be different from the mirror port The port number should be different from the http port " ready in " Sensor ready for use " ends at this time" Tried nothing Success All data will be sent again which takes time and can have consequences for Libreview and Kerfstok Error parsing IP Maximal number of hosts exceeded Juggluco sends to maximal 6 hosts hostname Now clamp "Send from: " Change start Above Uploader Upload Sibionics mmol/L mg/dL Interval Off Off " Streaming enabled" " Streaming not enabled" EverSense Broadcast Threshold Make floating glucose untouchable?
12h Complications Watchface color
Glucose value Glucose arrow Value + arrow Glucose Value small Glucose Arrow small Value + arrow small
Text Arrow WARNING: “Receive from” not set, but some data types are not sent. First specify for each label what should be done with it. Photo Scan the data matrix of a Dexcom G7/ONE+ or Sibionics GS1 sensor or the mirror QR code. Predict (Dexcom) Initializing Juggluco running on phone?\n\nWIFI and Bluetooth enabled? Connected! Close button \u23F0 File size Logging Insulin Aspart/NovoRapid/NovoLog Fiasp Insulin Lispro/Humalog URLi/Lyumjev/insulin lispro-aabc Insulin Glulisine/Apidra Human Insulin/Humulin R/Novolin R Afrezza Not Sibionics EU Sibionics Chinese Hematonix Sibionics 2 Split "Data present: " Overwrite? Auto QR
Send data from this phone to another phone on your home network. Pressing OK will generate a connection on this phone and display a QR code that can be scanned by another Android device. Scanning the QR code with left menu→Photo on the other phone will generate a connection, by which it will receive all data from this phone.
Google scan WARNING: weight (%.1f) not 0
" Very LOW glucose!" " Very HIGH glucose!"
" Very LOW!" " Very HIGH!"
" Soon LOW glucose!" " Soon HIGH glucose!"
Very low glucose alarm Very high glucose alarm
Alarm when soon below Alarm when soon above Schedules "Profile " Loss of signal Value notification
Scan TRANSMITTER data matrix Sibionics 2 sensor data matrix succesfully scanned. \nScan now the transmitter data matrix." Successfully added connection to left middle menu→Mirror. Reset Clears transmitter memory. Should be pressed before using a new sensor in an already used transmitter. Use the EverSense Broadcast instead. See help. Calibration Exclude Apply to past Blood glucose: Change slope Calibrated Delete calibration? Hide
Nothing yet Calibrations All values Write down! Switch "Last: " "Only add glucose readings from after: " "First select the label for blood glucose" "Glucose Meters" "Find devices" "No new data" "New data" Connected Disconnected phone watch Direct sensor- Enter amounts on connection Bug Internet Home net ICE Username
ICE Label 0 1
Mirror via QR Turn Servers Turn Server
Notification Chart Display glucose graph in notification bar Use Google Play Services for QR scanning Share/Receive data via Internet/Home Net Upload to Nightscout Blood Glucose Alerts Target Glucose Range Select Unit Select Theme Select Language System Default
Debug Logs Clear Trace.log Logcat Log enabled. Waiting for entries... Log unchecked. Enable to start. "Error reading file: " "Error saving file: "
Mirror Settings Auto QR Home Network Home Net Sender Internet Sender Home Net Receiver Internet Receiver Close Connection Label Deactivated Enable Disable ICE ICE Label Hostname / IP Test IP Test Label Master Passive Only Active Only Data present until: Show password Hide password
Turn Server Add Connection Help Send to Receive from QR Amounts Scans Stream Exchange data
Dashboard
No data available days Status No sensors found Add Sensor Sensors Add Sensor
Calibration Algorithm Restart auto-calibration? Clear all in-app auto-calibration data, restart algorithm and reconnect? Restart Auto Raw Auto+Raw Raw+Auto Restart auto-calibration
The trend is rising by %1$s percent. The trend is falling by %1$s percent. The trend remains unchanged.
%1$s in use %1$s remaining Expired %1$dd %1$dh
Theme System Default Light Dark
Advanced Debug Logs Nightscout Config
Low High
Disconnect Sensor? This will permanently stop the sensor session. Wipe sensor data Disconnect Keep sensor info
Reconnect Sensor? This will reset the connection and attempt to reconnect. Reconnect
Forget Sensor? This will remove the sensor from the list. It may reappear if scanned again.
Reset sensor? This will reset the Sibionics 2 sensor. Continue? Reset sensor
Reset all? Clear all old data, calibrations, and reset the sensor? Reset all
This will restart the sensor and reset the auto-calibration algorithm. Keep auto-calibration data
Enabled Disabled Last BLE status Address Started Ends Officially Expected End Auto reset %1$d days Never
No Sensor Connected Connect a continuous glucose monitor to start tracking your glucose levels.
Sibionics Setup Scan Sensor QR Code Scan the data matrix on the sensor packaging Select Sensor Type Scan Transmitter
Connecting... Setup Complete
Libre Setup Hold your phone near the sensor to scan Scan Libre Sensor
Dexcom Setup Scan the data matrix on your Dexcom sensor Scan Dexcom
Delete Sensor This will remove the sensor and all its data. This cannot be undone. Delete
General Settings Notifications
Data Management Export Data Save history to CSV/TSV Import Data Load backup or Libreview file Days to export
Danger Zone Clear History Remove all glucose readings. Cannot be undone. Remove all glucose readings Clear App Data Remove history and cache, keep settings Factory Reset Remove everything, return to first-run state Remove EVERYTHING. Cannot be undone! Factory Reset? Clear History? Clear App Data?
Turbo (high priority) Requests high connection priority AutoConnect Uses passive background connection View trace.log and logcat
mg/dL mmol/L Alert Mode Sound & Vibrate Vibrate
Import History Import glucose data from a CSV file Get started by adding your sensor Select Sensor Type " or " No sensors connected
Enter Sensor Codes Enter the codes printed on the sensor label Batch Code (10) First code on label (8-16 chars), e.g. %1$s Serial Number Second code (10-20 chars), e.g. %1$s Confirm
Enter Transmitter Code Enter the transmitter ID from the label Transmitter ID 8-12 characters from transmitter label
Scan QR Code Scan the QR code on your generic Sibionics sensor box. Scan QR Code Select from Gallery Skip (Use Fake Sensor) Enter Code Manually
Choose your Sibionics sensor variant Continue
Sensor initialization failed Error: Sensor lost. Please restart setup. "Invalid device name: " "Failed to connect to " Sensor not initialized. Use \'Scan Sensor\' first. Invalid code format. Please try again. No QR code found in image
Go Filter by date Select Export Format CSV File (.csv) Best for Excel/Analysis Readable Text (.txt) Best for sharing/printing Export Export History Save glucose readings to CSV or text file Import History Restore glucose readings from CSV file
Clear History? This will remove all glucose readings from the database. This action cannot be undone. Clear
Clear App Data? This will remove: • All glucose readings • Cache files • Sensor data • All settings Settings will be preserved. This action cannot be undone. Clear Data
⚠️ Factory Reset? This will REMOVE EVERYTHING: The app will return to first-run state. THIS CANNOT BE UNDONE! RESET EVERYTHING
Alert Sound GPL-3.0 • Fork of Juggluco Refreshing...
Auto-calibration mode Juggluco native window Auto restart algorithm
Bluetooth off Connection failed Connected Disconnected
Select sensor type Choose theme Sibionics Scan QR code Libre 2/3 Via NFC Dexcom G6/G7/One
Scan Transmitter Select a nearby device or scan the QR code. Clear previous state Scanning for devices... Search Bluetooth Found Devices: Looking for nearby transmitters... Or scan QR code Scan Transmitter
